title: pfaffia sericea
intro: Pfaffia sericea, also known as suma or para-aminobenzoic acid (PABA) plant, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pfaffia sericea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pfaffia sericea, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
